title: About
text:
Hi, I’m Renu
I work at the intersection of machine learning and biomedicine,
with a focus on building models that are interpretable, clinically useful, and fair.

title: Projects
text:
LOAD Endotyping (non‑APOE ε4)


Clustering + generative modeling to identify biological subtypes and mechanisms of heterogeneity.



Data: NACC UDS + NP + genetics modules


Methods: feature harmonization, contrastive reps, mixture models





Cognitive Support Chatbot


Adaptive, recall‑based dialogue with spaced repetition for memory support.



Design: ReMe‑inspired prompts, emotion‑aware adjustments


Eval: A/B vs. baseline prompting





BCI Finger Flexion


Windowed time‑domain features + LightGBM ensembles for ECoG decoding.



Features: line length, Hjorth, spectral entropy


Result: faster inference, strong Pearson r




```
